headline: GNT: Fundamentals For Gold Remain Strong, But This Fund Sacrifices Some Upside
summary: The GAMCO Natural Resources, Gold & Income Trust (GNT) offers an 8.18% yield via a covered call strategy on a diversified natural resources and gold portfolio. Read the full analysis here.
